---
title: "Welcome to the KAXA Blog"
date: 2026-03-15
author: "KAXA Team"
categories: [Announcement, Community]
description: "Introducing the KAXA blog and how we will share space engineering knowledge for Cambodia."
image: /image/CubeSat.jpg
---

This blog shares practical space engineering content, community updates, and learning resources for students and professionals in Cambodia.

Expect upcoming posts on:

-   Space mission explainers
-   Student pathways in engineering
-   Tools and skills for aerospace learning
-   News and event highlights from KAXA
